creator: baptiste.daroussin@gmail.com
text:
Here is the new version of the patch I replace grep by ${GREP} and only check
for absolute path.

I also fixed "make missing" and "make clean"

I think I haven't forgotten anything

--- bsd.port.mk-noportsdir-depends.patch begins here ---
--- bsd.port.mk.orig	2010-04-27 23:58:23.000000000 +0200
+++ bsd.port.mk	2010-05-12 16:57:15.666691113 +0200
@@ -5052,9 +5052,11 @@
 			break; \
 		fi; \
 		dir=`${ECHO_CMD} $$i | ${SED} -e 's/[^:]*://'`; \
+		${ECHO_CMD} "$${dir}" | ${GREP} -q "^/" || dir="${PORTSDIR}/$${dir}" ; \
 		if ${EXPR} "$$dir" : '.*:' > /dev/null; then \
 			target=`${ECHO_CMD} $$dir | ${SED} -e 's/.*://'`; \
 			dir=`${ECHO_CMD} $$dir | ${SED} -e 's/:.*//'`; \
+			${ECHO_CMD} "$${dir}" | ${GREP} -q "^/" || dir="${PORTSDIR}/$${dir}" ; \
 			if [ X${DEPENDS_PRECLEAN} != "X" ]; then \
 				target="clean $$target"; \
 				depends_args="$$depends_args NOCLEANDEPENDS=yes"; \
@@ -5154,6 +5156,7 @@
 		else \
 			dir=$${dir%%:*}; \
 		fi; \
+		${ECHO_CMD} "$${dir}" | ${GREP} -q "^/" || dir="${PORTSDIR}/$${dir}" ; \
 		${ECHO_MSG} -n "===>   ${PKGNAME} depends on shared library: $$lib"; \
 		if ${LDCONFIG} ${_LDCONFIG_FLAGS} -r | ${GREP} -vwF -e "${PKGCOMPATDIR}" | ${GREP} -qwE -e "-l$$pattern"; then \
 			${ECHO_MSG} " - found"; \
@@ -5198,6 +5201,7 @@
 	while [ -n "$$L" ]; do						\
 		l="";							\
 		for d in $$L; do					\
+			${ECHO_CMD} "$${d}" | ${GREP} -q "^/" || d="${PORTSDIR}/$${d}" ; \
 			case $$checked in				\
 			$$d\ *|*\ $$d\ *|*\ $$d)			\
 				continue;;				\
@@ -5229,6 +5233,7 @@
 	while [ -n "$$L" ]; do						\
 		l="";							\
 		for d in $$L; do					\
+			${ECHO_CMD} "$${d}" | ${GREP} -q "^/" || dir="${PORTSDIR}/$${d}" ; \
 			case $$checked in				\
 			$$d\ *|*\ $$d\ *|*\ $$d)			\
 				continue;;				\
@@ -5268,6 +5273,7 @@
 	while [ -n "$$L" ]; do						\
 		l="";							\
 		for d in $$L; do					\
+			${ECHO_CMD} "$${d}" | ${GREP} -q "^/" || d="${PORTSDIR}/$${d}" ; \
 			case $$checked in				\
 			$$d\ *|*\ $$d\ *|*\ $$d)			\
 				continue;;				\
@@ -5305,6 +5311,7 @@
 .if !target(clean-depends)
 clean-depends:
 	@for dir in $$(${CLEAN-DEPENDS-FULL}); do \
+		${ECHO_CMD} "$${dir}" | ${GREP} -q "^/" || dir="${PORTSDIR}/$${dir}" ; \
 		(cd $$dir; ${MAKE} NOCLEANDEPENDS=yes clean); \
 	done
 .endif
@@ -5312,6 +5319,7 @@
 .if !target(limited-clean-depends)
 limited-clean-depends:
 	@for dir in $$(${CLEAN-DEPENDS-LIMITED}); do \
+		${ECHO_CMD} "$${dir}" | ${GREP} -q "^/" || dir="${PORTSDIR}/$${dir}" ; \
 		(cd $$dir; ${MAKE} NOCLEANDEPENDS=yes clean); \
 	done
 .endif
@@ -5319,6 +5327,7 @@
 .if !target(deinstall-depends)
 deinstall-depends:
 	@for dir in $$(${ALL-DEPENDS-LIST}); do \
+		${ECHO_CMD} "$${dir}" | ${GREP} -q "^/" || dir="${PORTSDIR}/$${dir}" ; \
 		(cd $$dir; ${MAKE} deinstall); \
 	done
 .endif
@@ -5327,6 +5336,7 @@
 fetch-recursive:
 	@${ECHO_MSG} "===> Fetching all distfiles for ${PKGNAME} and dependencies"
 	@for dir in ${.CURDIR} $$(${ALL-DEPENDS-LIST}); do \
+		${ECHO_CMD} "$${dir}" | ${GREP} -q "^/" || dir="${PORTSDIR}/$${dir}" ; \
 		(cd $$dir; ${MAKE} fetch); \
 	done
 .endif
@@ -5334,6 +5344,7 @@
 .if !target(fetch-recursive-list)
 fetch-recursive-list:
 	@for dir in ${.CURDIR} $$(${ALL-DEPENDS-LIST}); do \
+		${ECHO_CMD} "$${dir}" | grep -q "^/" || dir="${PORTSDIR}/$${dir}" ; \
 		(cd $$dir; ${MAKE} fetch-list); \
 	done
 .endif
@@ -5357,10 +5368,12 @@
 		case $$dir in	\
 		*:*) if [ $$prog != $${prog\#/} -o ! -e $$prog ]; then	\
 				dir=$${dir%%:*};	\
+				${ECHO_CMD} "$${dir}" | ${GREP} -q "^/" || dir="${PORTSDIR}/$${dir}" ; \
 			else	\
 				continue;	\
 			fi;;	\
 		*) if [ -d ${PKG_DBDIR}/$$(cd $$dir; ${MAKE} -V PKGNAME) ]; then \
+				${ECHO_CMD} "$${dir}" | ${GREP} -q "^/" || dir="${PORTSDIR}/$${dir}" ; \
 				continue;	\
 			fi;;	\
 		esac;	\
@@ -5397,6 +5410,7 @@
 checksum-recursive:
 	@${ECHO_MSG} "===> Fetching and checking checksums for ${PKGNAME} and dependencies"
 	@for dir in ${.CURDIR} $$(${ALL-DEPENDS-LIST}); do \
+		${ECHO_CMD} "$${dir}" | ${GREP} -q "^/" || dir="${PORTSDIR}/$${dir}" ; \
 		(cd $$dir; ${MAKE} checksum); \
 	done
 .endif
@@ -5410,6 +5424,7 @@
 
 BUILD-DEPENDS-LIST= \
 	for dir in $$(${ECHO_CMD} "${EXTRACT_DEPENDS} ${PATCH_DEPENDS} ${FETCH_DEPENDS} ${BUILD_DEPENDS} ${LIB_DEPENDS}" | ${SED} -E -e 's,([^: ]*):([^: ]*)(:[^ ]*)?,\2,g' -e 'y/ /\n/'| ${SORT} -u); do \
+		${ECHO_CMD} "$${dir}" | ${GREP} -q "^/" || dir="${PORTSDIR}/$${dir}" ; \
 		if [ -d $$dir ]; then \
 			${ECHO_CMD} $$dir; \
 		else \
@@ -5424,6 +5439,7 @@
 
 RUN-DEPENDS-LIST= \
 	for dir in $$(${ECHO_CMD} "${_LIB_RUN_DEPENDS:C,.*:([^:]*).*,\1,}" | ${SED} -e 'y/ /\n/' | ${SORT} -u); do \
+		${ECHO_CMD} "$${dir}" | ${GREP} -q "^/" || dir="${PORTSDIR}/$${dir}" ; \
 		if [ -d $$dir ]; then \
 			${ECHO_CMD} $$dir; \
 		else \
@@ -5456,6 +5472,7 @@
 	fi; \
 	checked="${PARENT_CHECKED}"; \
 	for dir in ${_LIB_RUN_DEPENDS:C,[^:]*:([^:]*):?.*,\1,}; do \
+		${ECHO_CMD} "$${dir}" | ${GREP} -q "^/" || dir="${PORTSDIR}/$${dir}" ; \
 		dir=$$(${REALPATH} $$dir); \
 		if [ -d $$dir ]; then \
 			case $$checked in	\
@@ -5484,6 +5501,7 @@
 			fi; \
 		done); \
 		for dir in ${_LIB_RUN_DEPENDS:C,[^:]*:([^:]*):?.*,\1,}; do \
+			${ECHO_CMD} "$${dir}" | ${GREP} -q "^/" || dir="${PORTSDIR}/$${dir}" ; \
 			tmp=$${dir%/*}; \
 			dir=$${tmp\#\#*/}/$${dir\#\#*/}; \
 			set -- $$origins; \
@@ -5517,12 +5535,14 @@
 
 package-recursive: package
 	@for dir in $$(${ALL-DEPENDS-LIST}); do \
+		${ECHO_CMD} "$${dir}" | ${GREP} -q "^/" || dir="${PORTSDIR}/$${dir}" ; \
 		(cd $$dir; ${MAKE} package-noinstall); \
 	done
 
 # Show missing dependiencies
 missing:
 	@for dir in $$(${ALL-DEPENDS-LIST}); do \
+		${ECHO_CMD} "$${dir}" | ${GREP} -q "^/" || dir="${PORTSDIR}/$${dir}" ; \
 		THISORIGIN=$${dir##${PORTSDIR}/}; \
 		installed=$$(${PKG_INFO} -qO $${THISORIGIN}); \
 		if [ -z "$$installed" ]; then \
@@ -6144,6 +6164,7 @@
 config-recursive:
 	@${ECHO_MSG} "===> Setting user-specified options for ${PKGNAME} and dependencies";
 	@for dir in ${.CURDIR} $$(${ALL-DEPENDS-LIST}); do \
+		${ECHO_CMD} "$${dir}" | ${GREP} -q "^/" || dir="${PORTSDIR}/$${dir}" ; \
 		(cd $$dir; ${MAKE} config-conditional); \
 	done
 .endif
@@ -6213,6 +6234,7 @@
 showconfig-recursive:
 	@${ECHO_MSG} "===> The following configuration options are available for ${PKGNAME} and dependencies";
 	@for dir in ${.CURDIR} $$(${ALL-DEPENDS-LIST}); do \
+		${ECHO_CMD} "$${dir}" | ${GREP} -q "^/" || dir="${PORTSDIR}/$${dir}" ; \
 		(cd $$dir; ${MAKE} showconfig); \
 	done
 .endif
@@ -6240,6 +6262,7 @@
 rmconfig-recursive:
 	@${ECHO_MSG} "===> Removing user-specified options for ${PKGNAME} and dependencies";
 	@for dir in ${.CURDIR} $$(${ALL-DEPENDS-LIST}); do \
+		${ECHO_CMD} "$${dir}" | ${GREP} -q "^/" || dir="${PORTSDIR}/$${dir}" ; \
 		(cd $$dir; ${MAKE} rmconfig); \
 	done
 .endif
--- bsd.port.mk-noportsdir-depends.patch ends here ---
